prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. prop (mug_red_v1): state: story_clue, visually consistent. 第一盘录像开始播放。画面里，小林澈坐在厨房桌边，母亲在哭。, 林澈低声说：这是真的？. Narration: "第一盘录像开始播放。画面里，小林澈坐在厨房桌边，母亲在哭。". 林澈 says: "这是真的？". Camera motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift. continuity locks: charA_v1 (location: apartment_kitchen_or_hallway, pose: listening); mug_red_v1 (location: near_main_character, state: warm_and_unexplained). cinematic realistic suspense comic panel, stable young Chinese man identity, rainy old apartment, red mug as recurring clue, coherent low-cost storyboard frame. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
negative: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, text artifacts, logo, watermark, extra fingers, face drift, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, distorted limbs, burnt-in subtitles, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift
tool_hint: Copy "prompt" and "negative" into video generation tool. Upload "condition_images" for img2vid start/end frame conditioning if supported. Duration is a guideline.
